plan_metrics.plan_content:
## Plan Summary

**Root cause found:** Classic off-by-one error in `src/utils.ts`, line 7.

The `processItems` function uses `i < items.length - 1` as its loop condition, which causes the loop to stop one element too early â€” the last item is always skipped.

### The Fix (one character change)

| | Code |
|---|---|
| **Buggy** | `for (let i = 0; i < items.length - 1; i++)` |
| **Fixed** | `for (let i = 0; i < items.length; i++)` |

### Impact on Tests (`tests/utils.test.ts`)

| Test case | Before fix | After fix |
|---|---|---|
| `["hello", "world", "foo"]` â†’ `["HELLO", "WORLD", "FOO"]` | âťŚ FAIL (skips "FOO") | âś… PASS |
| `["test"]` â†’ `["TEST"]` | âťŚ FAIL (loop never runs) | âś… PASS |
| `["a", "b"]` â†’ `["A", "B"]` | âťŚ FAIL (skips "B") | âś… PASS |
| `[]` â†’ `[]` | âś… PASS | âś… PASS |

Approve the plan and I'll apply the single-line fix and run the tests.
